about.content:
Our Story

Japan Link Motors LTD MSA has been serving the coastal region of Kenya since 2015. Founded with a passion for quality automobiles and a commitment to transparent business practices, we have grown into one of Mombasa's most trusted car dealerships.

We specialize in importing high-quality Japanese vehicles — from fuel-efficient hatchbacks to rugged SUVs and luxury sedans. Every car in our inventory undergoes a rigorous inspection process to ensure it meets our exacting standards before it reaches the showroom floor.

Our Mission

To provide every customer with a seamless, honest, and satisfying car-buying experience through quality vehicles, transparent pricing, and exceptional after-sales service.

Why Choose Us

  • Direct imports from Japan with full documentation
  • Competitive pricing with no hidden fees
  • Professional after-sales support and warranty
  • Financing assistance through partner banks
  • Full NTSA registration and transfer handled for you
about.vision: To be the most trusted car dealership in the coastal region, known for integrity, quality, and customer-centric innovation.

team.name: Fatima Ali
team.title: Sales Manager
team.bio: Fatima leads our sales team with a customer-first approach. She has helped hundreds of customers find their perfect vehicle and specializes in matching buyers with the right financing options.

team.name: James Ochieng
team.title: Senior Sales Consultant
team.bio: James has been with Japan Link Motors for 6 years. His deep knowledge of Japanese vehicle specifications and market values makes him an invaluable resource for customers.

team.name: Mary Wanjiku
team.title: Finance & Insurance Advisor
team.bio: Mary handles all financing, insurance, and loan processing. She works closely with partner banks to secure the best rates for our customers.

team.name: Peter Kamau
team.title: Service Manager
team.bio: Peter manages our after-sales service center. With over 12 years of mechanical experience, he ensures every vehicle leaving our workshop is in top condition.

team.name: Aisha Mwinyi
team.title: Customer Relations Officer
team.bio: Aisha is the friendly voice you'll hear when you call or visit. She manages customer inquiries, test drive bookings, and ensures every visitor has a welcoming experience.
